_meta.purpose: Template patterns for normalizing writer-friendly Trigger: lines into parser-readable canonical form. Consumed by (1) the Cowork normalizer, which rewrites doc text to match a template phrasing, and (2) the Unity Editor importer, which parses canonical text into engine fields.
_meta.field_substitution: Template strings use {Name} placeholders (e.g. {N}, {Tag}). Regex capture groups feed back via $1/$2/... references in the `fields` map.
_meta.regex_anchoring: All regex patterns are implicitly anchored ^...$. Comparisons are case-sensitive.

milestone_conditions.template: Plays {N} or more cards in a loop
milestone_conditions.regex: ^Plays (\d+) or more cards in a loop$

milestone_conditions.notes: v1 supports 'fires at least once' semantics only. To allow explicit count thresholds (e.g. 'Funny tag fires 3 times'), add a second template entry with type DialogueTagFired and the appropriate regex/fields.
